<!--
el-linear PR template. Fill in each section — the requesting-code-review SOP
(and any AI reviewer) expects What / Why / How / Test on every PR.
Keep it short; link the Linear issue (e.g. DEV-1234) so it auto-closes on merge.
-->

## What

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change? -->

## Why

<!-- The motivation / problem being solved. Link the Linear issue: DEV-XXXX -->

## How

<!-- Key implementation choices, notable trade-offs, anything a reviewer should
     look at first. Omit if the diff is self-explanatory. -->

## Test

<!-- How you verified it. For el-linear that's typically:
     - `pnpm lint`
     - `pnpm build`
     - `pnpm test`  (note added/changed cases)
     Plus any manual CLI invocation you ran. -->

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
